# predictions are reported in the following way
# s(ret) e(ret) l(ret) s(lLTR) e(lLTR) l(lLTR) s(rLTR) e(rLTR) l(rLTR) sim(LTRs) seq-nr 
# where:
# s = starting position
# e = ending position
# l = length
# ret = LTR-retrotransposon
# lLTR = left LTR
# rLTR = right LTR
# sim = similarity
# seq-nr = sequence number
